_note: Covers only the test (70 prompts) and extended_test (168 prompts) splits; per-prompt F1 for the train (306) and val (64) splits is not stored in any eval output. All 7 variants (B0, M1, M2, M1_NAMM, M1_Trunc, M4, A4) now carry per-prompt F1. Prompt IDs follow the M1 eval and are identical across all variants. extended_test here uses the matched 168-prompt subset (27/45/38/18/40 across tasks), not the canonical 224-prompt extended_test in results/main_table_5t.

_definitions.too_hard: F1 < 0.3 for every variant in variants_considered
_definitions.hard: M1_Trunc F1 < 0.3 AND at least one other variant has F1 >= 0.3
